elements.description: Two 'ลาดเอียง 1:200' (1:200 floor slope) arrows shown, directing floor drainage toward the floor drains.
Door callout '1' near top-right of the room, referencing detail A-10 (diamond icon '1/A-10')
Window callout '2' at the top wall, referencing detail A-10 (diamond icon '2/A-10')
Triangle callout '3' appears twice on interior walls (ceramic tile finish reference, matches level markers '[3]+0.50[2]' / '[3]+0.48[2]' box notation seen at both fixture zones)

warnings: PATTERN unchanged from t3 ('plan' -- room layout with level/grid references).

This 1:25 detail plan of the WC.1 bathroom shares sheet A-09 with the fixture symbol legend -- see sibling file _หน้า11_symbol_legend.json (renamed from t3's _fixture_schedule.json to reflect its reclassification to pattern 'symbol').

Overall dimensions 2.45 m (width) and 2.00 m (depth) are legible at the top/side dimension chains, along with their sub-splits (0.80+0.10+0.40+0.70+0.45=2.45; 0.90+0.90+0.10+0.10=2.00) -- captured directly, not estimated.
This room corresponds to ห้องน้ำ_WC1 on the architectural floor plan (หน้า06); this sheet is the scaled 1:25 detail superseding that floor-plan-level box.

Detail callouts '1' (door) and '2' (window) both reference sheet A-10 (หน้า12 -- the WC.1 elevation/section sheet, reclassified this round from pattern 'section' to 'side_profile'); see _หน้า12_wc1_side_profile1.json / _หน้า12_wc1_side_profile2.json.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า11_wc1_plan.json: identical element set and dimensions, no content disagreement. Only wrapper-level change is the added source_image field and 'elements' (plural) key.
